infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Rakshya needs your location to send emergency alerts and track your safety.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Rakshya needs your location to send emergency alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Rakshya uses the camera to record evidence during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Rakshya uses the microphone to record audio evidence and detect voice commands.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Rakshya uses speech recognition to detect the secret safety phrase.
